allow: Bash(bun -e "console.log\('start'\); const m = await import\('./scripts/generate-cert.ts'\); console.log\('imported', Object.keys\(m\)\); try { const r = await m.ensureCert\(\); console.log\('done', r.cert.slice\(0, 30\)\); } catch \(e\) { console.error\('FAIL', e\); }")

Bash(bun -e "import {readdirSync, existsSync, statSync} from 'node:fs'; console.log\('certs exists:', existsSync\('certs'\)\); if \(existsSync\('certs'\)\) { console.log\(readdirSync\('certs'\)\); for \(const f of readdirSync\('certs'\)\) { console.log\(f, statSync\('certs/' + f\).size\); } }")
Bash(bun -e "import {rmSync} from 'node:fs'; rmSync\('certs', {recursive: true, force: true}\); console.log\('cleared'\);")
